title: santolina squarrosa
intro: Santolina squarrosa, also known as the woolly gray santolina, is a perennial shrubby plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Santolina squarrosa include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and essential oil extraction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
